mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO work_day (employee_id, project_id, `year_month`, work_days, piece_pay, loan, fine, tools_other, remark) VALUES
(#{item.employeeId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.yearMonth}, #{item.workDays}, #{item.piecePay}, #{item.loan}, #{item.fine}, #{item.toolsOther}, #{item.remark})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE work_days = VALUES(work_days), piece_pay = VALUES(piece_pay), loan = VALUES(loan), fine = VALUES(fine), tools_other = VALUES(tools_other), remark = VALUES(remark)
